attributes.description: Alerts when `INCREASE(redis.connections.rejected) > 0`. `maxclients` reached — new clients refused.
attributes.name: [Redis OTel] Rejected connections

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis rejected connections

### What fired
`redis.connections.rejected` increased during the window.

### Why it matters
Rejections happen when `maxclients` is reached. Clients hit connection errors and often retry storm, worsening the situation.

### Triage
1. Inspect current connected clients vs `maxclients`.
2. Check client pool configurations.

### Remediation
- Raise `maxclients` and OS FD limits.
- Fix client-side pooling.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE redis.connections.rejected IS NOT NULL
// Counter: use INCREASE to get rejections over the time window
| STATS rejected = SUM(INCREASE(redis.connections.rejected))
  BY server.address, server.port
// Alert when any instance rejected at least one connection (maxclients reached)
| WHERE rejected > 0
| SORT rejected DESC
